experience.title: Software Developer Intern
experience.description: Leading development of INDUSAC Innovation Ecosystem Matchmaking Platform connecting startups, investors, and research institutions across European innovation markets. Architecting scalable microservices backend using Spring Boot with PostgreSQL, implementing intelligent matching algorithms.

experience.title: Full Stack Engineer
experience.description: Built horizoneurope.io, an AI-powered EU funding guidance platform serving 5,000+ monthly users. Developed smart context management engine processing 500+ funding opportunities with NLP-based categorization. Created high-speed scrapers and a lightweight UI with real-time API responses under 2ms.

certifications.name: ASP.NET Core with Orchard Core CMS

projects.title: HorizonEurope.io
projects.shortDesc: AI-powered EU funding guidance platform serving 5,000+ monthly users with real-time API responses under 2ms.
projects.description: Built during my role as Full Stack Engineer at EISMEA (European Innovation Council). The platform helps researchers find the right EU funding opportunities using AI-powered matching, smart context management, and automated document processing. Features high-speed scrapers for EU grant data extraction and an intelligent categorization engine processing 500+ funding opportunities.
features: Smart context management engine for intelligent interactions
High-speed scraper bypassing captchas for EU grant data
Document processing for EU funding calls

projects.title: Neptun API
projects.shortDesc: The most complete Python wrapper for Hungary's Neptun university system — 1,100+ endpoints reverse-engineered across 75+ controllers.
projects.description: A comprehensive Python library that reverse-engineers the Angular web client of Hungary's Neptun university management system. Covers 25+ functional areas including messaging (18+ methods), calendar (29), courses (60+), exams (30+), grades (21), financials (50+), and more. Features automated JWT authentication with transparent token refresh, Playwright-based survey automation, and MCP server support for AI assistant integration.
features: Automated JWT authentication with token refresh
MCP server for Claude Desktop and Cursor integration
Support for multiple Hungarian universities (Óbuda, BME, ELTE)
Modular pip installation with optional extras

projects.title: Gmail AI Assistant
projects.shortDesc: AI-powered Gmail automation using dual LLMs for smart email categorization, priority detection, and response generation.
projects.description: An intelligent email management platform that leverages DeepSeek R1 and Mistral AI to automate Gmail workflows. Features secure Google OAuth 2.0 integration, AI-powered email categorization and prioritization, smart response generation, and batch processing for 1,000+ emails.
features: Dual LLM support (DeepSeek R1 + Mistral AI)
Dark mode UI with Radix components
challenges: Managing API rate limits and costs

projects.title: Trading Bot
projects.shortDesc: Automated BUY-only grid trading bot for XAUUSD on MetaTrader 5 with real-time dashboard and tick-based backtester.
projects.description: A sophisticated grid-trading strategy bot for gold (XAUUSD) on MetaTrader 5. Uses pure grid mechanics — no indicators, no prediction. Features automatic pause/resume after stop-loss events, a real-time web dashboard for monitoring, a tick-based backtester using real MT5 data, and a comprehensive test suite with 32 passing tests.
features: Tick-based backtester with real MT5 data

projects.title: Filmu
projects.shortDesc: Full-stack VOD streaming platform with HLS video, live TV channels, subscription management, and admin dashboard.
projects.description: A comprehensive Netflix-like streaming platform built with the MERN stack. Users can browse movies and TV series, watch live channels via HLS streaming, manage subscriptions, and track watch history. Includes an admin dashboard for user and financial management, a referral program, and M3U playlist processing.
features: HLS adaptive video streaming (ArtPlayer, Video.js, HLS.js)
Live TV channels with country-based filtering

projects.title: SignalApp
projects.shortDesc: Real-time forex and binary trading signals mobile app with Firebase, role-based access, and push notifications.
projects.description: A mobile trading signals platform delivering real-time market insights via Firebase Realtime Database. Features Google Sign-In authentication, admin/sender signal management panel, role-based access control, and a responsive UI with haptic feedback. Built with React Native and Expo 52.
features: Cross-device responsive UI with haptic feedback
challenges: Balancing information density with UI clarity
